policy.github: Code, app shell, small JSON manifests, QA reports, and scripts only.
policy.huggingFace: Primary storage for Alpecca source art, generated art batches, and browser-safe runtime art payloads.
policy.cloudflare: Preview/app hosting only. Do not upload source art or heavyweight generated art here.

runtime.fallbackPolicy: Use local assets on localhost. Use Hugging Face runtime assets on static/Cloudflare preview when no override is supplied.

animationLibraryGoal.targetViewSystem: 16 horizontal view sectors with low/eye/high vertical tiers, compiled into approved runtime atlases
animationLibraryGoal.firstProductionGate: No runtime promotion until design lock, white thigh-high leggings, no baked halo/shadow, transparent cutout, stable 5ft7 body class, and preview QA pass.
